data.description: U.S. OFFICIALS REPORT THAT IRAN IS LAYING MINES IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ, ACCORDING TO THE NEW YORK TIMES. THIS CONTRADICTS EARLIER REMARKS BY TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT WHO STATED IRAN HAD NOT MINED THE STRAIT.

RIO TINTO HAS SUSPENDED ALL MINING OPERATIONS AT ITS KENNECOTT FACILITY.

data.title: Conifex Provides Corporate Update
data.description: Vancouver, BC - Today, Conifex Timber Inc. (TSX: CFF) disclosed a change in the timing of their fourth quarter 2025 results announcement. The update states that the results will now be released before the market opens on March 23, 2026. Subsequently, the earnings call has been rescheduled to take place at 8:00 AM PT / 11:00 AM ET on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. For those interested in participating in the call, the provided number should be dialed at the designated time.

data.title: Aebi Schmidt Group to release Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings on March 19, 2026
data.description: Aebi Schmidt Group, a leading specialty vehicles company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AEBI, is set to release its financial results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2025. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, March 19, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, the Company will conduct an earnings conference call and webcast at 8:30 am Eastern Time on the same day. This event will provide insights into the Company's performance during the stated periods, attracting the attention of investors and stakeholders.
JAPAN IS SET TO JOIN THE U.S. MISSILE DEFENSE SYSTEM, WITH THE ANNOUNCEMENT EXPECTED AT AN UPCOMING SUMMIT, ACCORDING TO YOMIURI.

data.title: Trump sets policy without legislation by suing GOP states, reversing old cases. Using courts for fast-track policy changes.
data.description: The Trump administration has been utilizing legal action against Republican states and implementing significant policy changes through rapid reversals in previous cases. This strategy involves leveraging the court system to expedite these shifts, showcasing a proactive approach to reforming policies.

data.title: IBM unveils plan to integrate quantum processors into supercomputing centers for advanced drug discovery simulations.
data.description: IBM has released a reference architecture that allows for the integration of quantum processors into current supercomputing centers. This advancement will enable molecular simulations that surpass the capabilities of traditional computing. By combining quantum and classical computing systems, researchers can push the boundaries of scientific exploration. This breakthrough signifies a major step forward in harnessing the power of quantum technology for practical applications.

data.title: IBM introduces groundbreaking quantum-centric supercomputing blueprint, integrating QPU with HPC infrastructure. #innovation #technology
data.description: IBM has introduced a pioneering reference architecture for quantum-centric supercomputing, facilitating the integration of Quantum Processing Units (QPUs) with current High-Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructure and classical accelerators. This development marks a breakthrough in the industry as it allows for enhanced computational capabilities. The inclusion of QPUs alongside classical accelerators is a significant advancement in supercomputing technology, with implications for various industries seeking to leverage quantum computing power. This initiative represents IBM's commitment to advancing quantum computing and expanding its applications in the realm of supercomputing.

data.title: Fatal incident at Rio Tinto Kennecott
data.description: In London, Rio Tinto expressed deep regret over the tragic incident at Bingham Canyon Mine in Utah on March 12th, leading to the death of a contractor employee. Rio Tinto's CEO, Simon Trott, conveyed immense sorrow over the loss and extended heartfelt sympathies to the victim's family, friends, colleagues, and the Kennecott community. The company is collaborating with authorities and contractors to provide thorough support during this difficult time.
U.S. MILITARY SAYS IT IS AWARE OF THE LOSS OF A U.S. KC-135 REFUELING AIRCRAFT
US Military: The incident occurred in friendly airspace during Operation Epic Fury, and rescue efforts are ongoing.

data.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce advocates for simpler disclosure rules & encourages tokenization experimentation. #CryptoMom #SEC
data.description: Hester Peirce, a Commissioner at the SEC, has recommended for regulators to streamline corporate disclosure regulations and to consider permitting the exploration of tokenized securities through an innovation exemption. This move aims to facilitate easier disclosure for companies and to allow for experimentation with tokenized securities.

data.title: Tailored Testing Services Congratulates Governor-Elect Abigail Spanberger and Affirms Support in Strengthening Virginia’s Response to the Opioid Crisis
data.description: Tailored Testing Services (TTS) in DUMFRIES, Va. congratulates Governor Abigail Spanberger on her historic election win. TTS, in partnership with NDASA, aims to assist the Governor in tackling substance misuse, opioid addiction, and enhancing workforce safety in the Commonwealth. Governor Spanberger's experience in federal law enforcement will be crucial in this effort.

data.title: BioSyent Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release for March 19, 2026
data.description: BioSyent Inc., a pharmaceutical company based in Mississauga, Ontario, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, on Thursday, March 19, 2026, after market hours. The presentation, led by René Goehrum, President and CEO of BioSyent, will be accessible on the company's website upon release. The company is listed on the TSX Venture under the ticker symbol RX. This update was shared on March 12, 2026.

data.title: GURU Organic Energy Announces Election of Directors
data.description: On March 12, 2026, GURU Organic Energy Corp. (TSX: GURU), a top organic energy drink brand in Canada, revealed that the candidates outlined in its January 29, 2026 circular were chosen as directors of the Company during the recent annual shareholders' meeting. Key details include: the nominees from the circular were confirmed as directors, emphasizing stability in leadership.
